name: Win Shuer's Bar Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Butter or margarine, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a large double boiler.
2. Cook until completely melted and smooth.
3. When smooth, process about 1 cup of the mixture at a time through a blender on high speed using pulse for about 1 minute or until each cupful is satiny smooth.
4. The mixture may tend to curdle as it cooks, but this can be smoothed out with use of a blender.
5. Store in a tight-fitting jar and refrigerate to be used within a month.
6. Freeze to be used within 3 months.
